scripts.build: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge build; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping (install via foundryup)'; fi
scripts.check:abi: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge build && diff -u out/IClanWorld.sol/IClanWorld.json abi/IClanWorld.json; else echo 'forge not installed; skipping ABI drift check'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then forge build && diff -u out/IClanWorld.sol/IClanWorld.json abi/IClanWorld.json && forge test;  else echo 'forge not installed; skipping'; fi
